With its sleek exterior and well-appointed interior, this Corolla SE is ready to take on your daily commute or weekend adventures. The 2.0L I4 engine paired with the CVT transmission delivers an impressive 31 city / 40 highway MPG, making it a practical and fuel-efficient choice.Inside, you'll find a host of premium features, including an 8 Toyota Audio Multimedia system, remote keyless entry, an exterior parking camera, and premium seat trim. The alloy wheels and stylish accents add a touch of sophistication to the Corolla's already attractive design.As a Toyota Gold Certified vehicle, this Corolla SE comes with a comprehensive warranty and a range of additional benefits, including a $0 deductible, 7 years/100,000 miles of roadside assistance, and trouble-free handling of your transaction, including DMV paperwork. You can drive with confidence knowing that this Corolla has been thoroughly inspected and backed by Toyota's renowned quality and reliability.Don't miss your chance to experience the exceptional value and peace of mind that comes with owning this 2023 Toyota Corolla SE.
